summary: Profile Management and Role-Based Permissions testing completed successfully. 16 backend tests passed (2 skipped due to no other users in company). Frontend tests verified role-based sidebar filtering works correctly for admin, store, and employee roles. My Profile page allows employees to update phone, address, city, state, postal code, and emergency contact information.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - non-blocking but should be addressed for cleaner console

critical_code_review_comments: Profile Management APIs correctly implement limited field updates (phone, address, city, state, postal_code, emergency_contact)
Role-based permissions work correctly - /api/roles returns filtered roles based on user's can_create_roles permission
/api/my-permissions returns correct module list for each role
Frontend sidebar filtering correctly hides menu items based on user role
Store role has access to: Dashboard, Products, Inventory, GRN, Packaging Rules, Suppliers, Purchase Orders, Manufacturing, My Portal
Employee role has access to: Attendance, Leave Management, My Portal only
seed_data_creation: Test users already existed (store_user@test.com, emp_user@test.com). Admin user (manager_test@test.com) is linked to employee Jane Smith (EMP-001) for profile testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile Management and Roles testing complete. Three test users available in different companies: admin (manager_test@test.com - Test Company), store (store_user@test.com - Store Test Co), employee (emp_user@test.com - Emp Test Co). Role-based sidebar filtering works correctly - verified with screenshots.

Profile Management API.GET /api/portal/my-profile: PASS - Returns employee data (Jane Smith, EMP-001)
Profile Management API.PUT /api/portal/my-profile (address): PASS - Updates address, city, state, postal_code

Roles API.GET /api/roles (admin): PASS - Returns all 5 roles (admin, manager, accountant, store, employee)
Roles API.GET /api/roles (store): PASS - Returns empty list (store can't create roles)
Roles API.GET /api/my-permissions (admin): PASS - Returns admin role with wildcard access
Roles API.GET /api/my-permissions (store): PASS - Returns store modules (products, inventory, grn, etc.)
Roles API.GET /api/my-permissions (employee): PASS - Returns employee modules (my-dashboard, my-tasks, attendance, leave-management)

Role Assignment.Admin can assign roles: SKIPPED - No other users in admin's company
Role Assignment.Invalid role rejected: SKIPPED - No other users in company

Frontend Role-based Sidebar.Admin sidebar: PASS - Shows all menu sections (verified with screenshot)
Frontend Role-based Sidebar.Store sidebar: PASS - Shows Dashboard, Products, Inventory, GRN, Packaging Rules, Suppliers, PO, Manufacturing, My Portal (verified with screenshot)
Frontend Role-based Sidebar.Employee sidebar: PASS - Shows only Attendance, Leave Management, My Portal (verified with screenshot)

My Profile UI.Page loads: PASS - Shows employee name (Jane Smith), EMP code, department
My Profile UI.Input fields: PASS - Phone, address, city, state, postal code, emergency contact fields visible
